Banner.title:
We build our future
Brick by Brick!

text.paragraph0: We are team #15996, BrickBot, from <cnu>"Unirea" National College, Focșani, Romania</cnu>.
text.paragraph1: We are proud to be the first robotics team in our county to take part in the international competition <ftc>FIRST Tech Challenge</ftc>.
text.paragraph2: We dedicate ourselves with a passion for building robots and promoting STEAM education within our community.

Carousel.SparkHope2025: SparkHope Robotics Cup Winning Alliance, August 2025
Carousel.FocsaniMeet2025: DIVE Into Innovation League Meet, Jan 2025

Answer.paragraph0: FIRST (For Inspiration and Recognition of Science and Technology) is an organization that encourages young people to study STEAM subjects through robotics competitions.
Answer.paragraph1: Within <ftc>FIRST Tech Challenge (FTC)</ftc>, teams of primary school and high school build and program robots every year, to fulfill a series of dynamic tasks.
Answer.paragraph2: The competition was brought to Romania by <natie>Nație Prin Educație</natie>, partnering with <brd>BRD</brd>.

1.Question: What fields does the team work in?

Answer.paragraph0: Our team combines technical skills with non-technical ones, both branches working together frequently.
Answer.paragraph1: The technical side consists of the assembly, 3D design and programming departments, while the non-tehcnical side takes on the mission of promoting the team and its social media pages (PR), graphic design, photography and attracting new sponsors.

Answer.paragraph0: To join the team you have to be a student of <cnu>"Unirea" National College of Focșani</cnu> and to be over 13 years old.
Answer.paragraph1: You don't need to have prior experience within your desired department. You will start off as a recruit and, with our help, you will be brought up to speed with all aspects of your chosen branch.
Answer.paragraph2: Complete the application form by clicking <apply>here</apply>.

Answer.paragraph0: You can support us through sponsorships or donations, receiving appropriate benefit according to our sponsorship packages. Likewise, we are open to attending or organizing events alongside companies or institutions.

text.paragraph0: Since 2016, season after season, we've been building robots for the <ftc>FIRST Tech Challenge</ftc> and we live by the values that represent us: outreach, creativity, ambition and team spirit.
text.paragraph1: Every step, from the first sketch to the final tests, reflects steady progress, built brick by brick. This is how we’ve shaped our team's identity and contributed to making STEAM education more accessible to young people.

JoinBrickBot.title: Join Brickbot
JoinBrickBot.text: Passionate about robotics? Fill out the form to show your interest in joining our team.

TheVault.submitText: Inspire the FTC community with your work.

text.paragraph0: Every year, student from more and more primary schools in our town discover robotics through our interactive presentations.
text.paragraph1: After they learn more things about us and the competitions we take part in, they get the chance to drive our robot and ask us any questions they might have.

InteractingWithThePublic.title: Interacting with the Public
InteractingWithThePublic.text: We get involved in our local community through presentations at different events, humanitarian activites, partnerships with businesses to spread our passion for robotics with as large a public as possible.

Carousel.BehindTheScrews: Behind The Screws - Collaboration with CEX Vrancea
Carousel.MicrometEvent: Exchange Event with our Main Sponsor, Micromet

text.paragraph0: An online meeting dedicated to the new FTC teams in Romania and the Moldovan Republic. We shared lessons we learned from our challenges and memorable moments of past competitions.
text.paragraph1: This event was organized in collaboration with team #25482 SIRIUS, which we are mentoring.

HowToHelp.title: How to Help
HowToHelp.text: BrickBot operates with the support of sponsors (companies, businesses, individuals). There are three ways to support us:

Redirect.title: Redirect 3.5%
Redirect.text: Romanian citizens can help BrickBot by redirecting 3.5% of income tax through Form 230 from the start of the year, until the 25th of May.

Donate.title: Donate
Donate.text: Anyone can support the BrickBot Association by making a secure donation through Stripe.

Contracts.title: Sponsorship Contracts
Contracts.text: You can support our initiative through financial contributions and/or services. The partnership will be formalized via a contract between your business and our organization.

Address.title: Address
Address.address: 13-15 Cezar Bolliac Street, Focșani, Vrancea, Romania

TermsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions - BrickBot Association
TermsAndConditions.content:
Last updated: 26.03.2026

1. General Information
This site is operated by the Brickbot Association, a non-governmental, non-profit organization, headquartered in Focșani, 15 Cezar Bolliac Street, Vrancea, legally registered in Romania with CIF 50846996. The purpose of our platform is to support STEM education and ensure the necessary infrastructure for our robotics team's participation in national and international competitions.

2. Nature of Transactions: Donations and Sponsorships
All payments processed through this site represent voluntary donations or sponsorships intended exclusively to support the educational activities of the Brickbot Association.
These contributions do not represent payment for commercial goods, services, pre-orders, or financial investments.
Donors do not receive material goods in exchange for the amounts offered, their contribution having a strictly philanthropic and performance-supporting purpose.

3. Refund Policy
Considering the legal nature of donations to an NGO, the transferred amounts are, in principle, non-refundable. However, we treat every interaction with transparency and fairness. We will process a full refund exclusively under the following exceptional conditions:
Technical errors: If a donation was processed twice due to a system error.
Unauthorized transactions: If it is determined that the payment was made fraudulently, without the cardholder's consent.
To request a refund for the reasons mentioned above, please contact us within a maximum of 14 days from the transaction date at the email address: brickbot@liceulunirea.ro. Requests will be analyzed and resolved within 5-7 business days.

4. Payment Security
All financial transactions are processed in a strictly secure environment by our partner, Stripe. The Brickbot Association does not request or store your bank card data. Payment processing is done in RON / EUR, and the association does not charge any additional transaction fees.

5. Contact Information
For any questions related to donations, partnerships, or the operation of the association, you can contact us anytime at:
Email: brickbot@liceulunirea.ro
Phone: +40744707212
Physical address: Focsani, 15 Cezar Bolliac Street, Vrancea, Romania

ConfidentialityPolicy.title: Privacy Policy - BrickBot Association
ConfidentialityPolicy.content:
Privacy Policy – Brickbot Association
Last updated: 22.03.2026

At the Brickbot Association, we build robots with precision and treat your personal data with the exact same care. This policy simply and transparently explains what information we collect when you visit brickbot.ro or choose to support STEM education through donations, and how we use this data.

1. What data we collect and why
When you make a donation or sponsorship to support our team, we collect only the data strictly necessary to process the transaction and comply with current financial legislation:
Identification data: First name, last name, email address (to send you the donation confirmation and our thanks).
Financial data: We do not store your card data. All transactions are securely processed by our payment partner, Stripe. We only receive the transaction confirmation and a history necessary for our accounting (as an NGO).

2. The intent behind the data
We do not trade information. We use your data exclusively for:
Secure processing of donations and sponsorships.
Issuing supporting documents according to the law (receipts, sponsorship contracts).
Communication related to payment confirmation or, if you have given your consent, brief updates about our team's progress in robotics competitions.

3. Who else has access to your data
Our ecosystem is closed and secure. The only external entities that interact with your data are:
Stripe: Our payment processor, which handles financial transactions at the highest global security standards.
State authorities: Only if the law compels us to report the Association's financial-accounting documents.

4. Your rights (GDPR)
You have total control over the data you provide to us. You have the right to request access to it, correct it, or request its deletion from our database (within the limits imposed by financial legislation regarding the archiving of donations).

5. Contact
If you have questions about how we protect your data, you can write directly to us at: brickbot@liceulunirea.ro
